ddls:
CREATE TABLE "olympic_games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each Olympic Game */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the Olympic Game took place */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season of the Olympic Game (e.g., Winter, Summer) */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the Olympic Game was held */,
  "game_code" TEXT /* Unique code for each Olympic Game */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the Olympic Games */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the Olympic Games */,
  "total_athletes" INTEGER /* Total number of athletes participating in the Games */,
  "total_countries" INTEGER /* Total number of countries participating in the Games */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number to track changes over time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sports" (
  "sport_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sport */,
  "sport_name" TEXT /* Name of the sport (e.g., Biathlon, Athletics) */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the sport */,
  "icon_url" TEXT /* URL to an icon or image representing the sport */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "disciplines" (
  "discipline_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each discipline */,
  "sport_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sport the discipline belongs to */,
  "discipline_name" TEXT /* Name of the discipline (e.g., Biathlon, Marathon) */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the discipline */,
  "icon_url" TEXT /* URL to an icon or image representing the discipline */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("discipline_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_disciplines_sport_id FOREIGN KEY ("sport_id") REFERENCES sports ("sport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "discipline_id" INTEGER /* ID of the discipline the event belongs to */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event (e.g., Military Patrol, 100m) */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., individual, team) */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the event (in minutes or hours) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_discipline_id FOREIGN KEY ("discipline_id") REFERENCES disciplines ("discipline_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "athletes" (
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each athlete */,
  "athlete_name" TEXT /* Full name of the athlete */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* Country code of the athlete's country */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the athlete (e.g., Men, Women) */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the athlete */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the athlete */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the athlete (in cm) */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the athlete (in kg) */,
  "sport_id" INTEGER /* ID of the primary sport the athlete competes in */,
  "profile_url" TEXT /* URL to the athlete's profile or biography */,
  "retirement_date" TEXT /* Date when the athlete retired from competitive sports */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("athlete_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_athletes_country_code FOREIGN KEY ("country_code") REFERENCES countries ("country_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_athletes_sport_id FOREIGN KEY ("sport_id") REFERENCES sports ("sport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* Country code (e.g., FRA, SUI) */,
  "flag_url" TEXT /* URL to the flag of the country */,
  "total_olympic_medals" INTEGER /* Total number of medals won by the country in all Olympic Games */,
  "total_gold_medals" INTEGER /* Total number of gold medals won by the country */,
  "total_silver_medals" INTEGER /* Total number of silver medals won by the country */,
  "total_bronze_medals" INTEGER /* Total number of bronze medals won by the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "medals" (
  "medal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medal */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event the medal was awarded for */,
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* ID of the athlete the medal was awarded to */,
  "medal_type" TEXT /* Type of medal (e.g., Gold, Silver, Bronze) */,
  "award_date" TEXT /* The date when the medal was awarded */,
  "award_ceremony" TEXT /* Name of the award ceremony where the medal was presented */,
  "medal_rank" TEXT /* Rank of the athlete in the event (e.g., 1st, 2nd, 3rd) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("medal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medals_athlete_id FOREIGN KEY ("athlete_id") REFERENCES athletes ("athlete_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medals_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participations" (
  "participation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participation event */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event the athlete participated in */,
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* ID of the athlete who participated in the event */,
  "participation_date" TEXT /* The date of the event participation */,
  "result" TEXT /* The result or performance of the athlete in the event (e.g., time, score) */,
  "rank" TEXT /* The rank of the athlete in the event */,
  "team_members" TEXT /* List of team members if the event is a team event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participations_athlete_id FOREIGN KEY ("athlete_id") REFERENCES athletes ("athlete_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participations_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)
